name: LUCIDS
overview: Benjamin and Oliver have woken up to find out the past 15 years of their lives were nothing more than a dream. Jasper has discovered that an entire cult formed around his 1997 Pampers commercials was simply to take his identity. And Mrs. Hills reveals that Jasper Prime is, in fact, the lost memory of her son, Quinn. Now they come together in a sci-fi existential comedic mystery.
